## What would you like?

A clear description of the feature or capability you'd like to see.

## Use case

Describe the integration scenario or workflow this would enable.

## API domain

<!-- Is this for an existing covered API, or a new domain to add? -->
- [ ] Product Integration API (TR) — already covered in Phase 1
- [ ] Product Integration V2 API (TR) — already covered in Phase 1
- [ ] International Marketplace Product Integration API — already covered in Phase 1
- [ ] Shipment API — planned for future phase
- [ ] Orders API — planned for future phase
- [ ] Finance API — planned for future phase
- [ ] Claims API — planned for future phase
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Expected behavior

How should the plugin behave with this feature?

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've already considered.

## Additional context

Any other context, examples, or references.
